typed_feature_handoffs.evidence: Stage 26D PR #357 and 17 focused unit tests

accessibility.automated_standard: WCAG 2 A/AA and WCAG 2.1 A/AA detectable rules

live_production_route.activation: measurement build only; normal production flag remains unset
live_production_route.data_source: live ED-Finder API payloads plus the bounded build-emitted authoritative region asset, fulfilled unchanged into the measured route

supported: Results, Galaxy, and Reference view presets
bounded authoritative region labels and continuous boundaries
typed production error and empty-state composition
production_feature_parity.normalized_overlay_buffer_test: pass at 4272000 bytes against an 8388608-byte budget
production_feature_parity.region_asset: pass at 2312898 bytes, 42 labels, and 22595 boundaries against a 4194304-byte response budget
production_feature_parity.live_route_wiring: pass behind exact VITE_STAGE26E_PRODUCTION_MAP=enabled flag with the region asset emitted only in flagged builds; normal production value remains unset and omits the asset
production_feature_parity.full_regression: 31 focused unit tests, two retained Chromium journeys, six Chromium/Firefox/WebKit viewport cells, Axe, visual golden, and two live-route viewport measurements pass

region_redistribution_legal.service_posture: project owner confirmed ED-Finder is non-commercial on 2026-07-22

frontier_fan_disclaimer.text: ED-Finder was created using assets and imagery from Elite Dangerous, with the permission of Frontier Developments plc, for non-commercial purposes. It is not endorsed by nor reflects the views or opinions of Frontier Developments and no employee of Frontier Developments was involved in the making of it.

region_redistribution_legal.region_names_and_rle_geometry_rights: project owner confirmed coverage under Frontier's non-commercial media guidance on 2026-07-22; recorded as an owner governance decision rather than independent legal advice
region_redistribution_legal.funding_posture: ED-Finder is currently free and non-commercial. Donation mechanisms are outside this review and are not implemented or relied on; other community tools are precedent, not formal permission.

production_route_cutover.remaining_route_step: make the explicit production flag activation and deployment decision, smoke-check the public route, and retain the established renderer as an immediate flag-based rollback
